hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams link source-of-funds checks to wallets and customers, preserving audit evidence and structuring transaction risk within one unified compliance workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule

problem_title: Source of funds reviews lack clear linkage
problem_description: Compliance teams at VASPs struggle to connect source of funds checks directly to wallets and customer profiles. This disconnect slows risk assessment and weakens audit trails across transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects source of funds checks with wallet activity and customer profiles to create a unified workflow that improves risk assessment and preserves audit-ready evidence for transaction monitoring teams.
workflow_title: From source of funds to review decisions
workflow_description: SFTY links source of funds risk signals with wallet activity, customer data and alerts to create cases that support structured compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One source-of-funds control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, on-chain risk signals and source-of-funds reviews into structured cases, decisions and evidence for clearer VASP compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASPs in source of funds?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs connect source-of-funds checks to wallets, transactions and customers within a connected compliance workflow, improving risk visibility and case management across on-chain and off-chain data.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect source-of-funds data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates outputs from multiple KYT and source-of-funds providers, linking wallet risk, transaction activity and customer profiles into structured cases for consistent review and decision-making.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve source-of-funds evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready case history, decision logs and all supporting documentation related to source-of-funds checks, supporting traceability for internal review and external audit requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYT and analytics vendors, connecting their outputs into a streamlined compliance layer without requiring changes to current provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace source-of-funds analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace any analytics or source-of-funds providers; it layers workflows and evidence management atop those providers’ outputs for stronger operational control.
final_title: Connect source of funds to wallets and customers
final_description: Review how SFTY structures source-of-funds checks into connected KYT workflows, cases, evidence and compliance decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
